title: OCR dual-path — strategy param + confidence scoring + Windows auto-install
what_failed: ocr_image had no strategy control, no confidence scoring, and failed silently on Windows if Tesseract binary path wasn't in PATH.
fix_applied: tools/tools_media.py: ocr_image(path, strategy='auto') — auto falls back to Claude vision when Tesseract confidence <50%. confidence field in response (0.0-1.0). TESSERACT_CMD env var wired into pytesseract.tesseract_cmd at import time. scripts/install_tesseract.py: downloads UB-Mannheim 5.x MSI, runs silent install, writes TESSERACT_CMD to .env.
